summary: General-route sample that records a visible game-regulation classification mismatch.

issue_map.answer: The agent remains in the routed general mode but records that the facts appear game-regulation specific.

key_findings: The routed mode is preserved, but classification mismatch is recorded as a coverage gap while src_001 anchors the sample source.

coverage_gaps.description: Question facts appear game-regulation specific, but orchestrator routed the task as general.
